APPLICATION_ACCEPTED.title: Application accepted ✅
APPLICATION_ACCEPTED.body: Congratulations! Your application has been accepted. Please review your contract.

APPLICATION_REJECTED.title: Application result
APPLICATION_REJECTED.body: Unfortunately, your application was not accepted this time.

NEW_APPLICATION.title: New application received
NEW_APPLICATION.body: A new worker has applied to your job posting.

CONTRACT_READY.title: Contract issued 📄
CONTRACT_READY.body: Please review and sign your contract.

CONTRACT_SIGNED.title: Contract signed
CONTRACT_SIGNED.body: The contract has been successfully signed.
